creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
You'll need the following patch to be placed to the port's
'files/' directory:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/mplayer/mplayer-0.99.11_17-patch-error.h
It should be named patch-error.h or simular.

I had tested it at 8.0 and MPlayer builds fine and works flawlessly.
Moreover, the latest SVN snapshot from
  http://www.mplayerhq.hu/MPlayer/releases/mplayer-checkout-snapshot.tar.bz2
shows that this header was removed from the upstream, so such patch
is most likely the Right Thing (TM).
-- 
Eygene

 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
    {_.-``-'         {_/            #
